positive: Minimalist celestial map featuring abstract constellations connecting glowing geometric shapes, surrounded by subtle, stylized nebula clouds and crescent moons. The overall aesthetic is ethereal, academic, and modern. Use a limited color palette of deep midnight blue, cosmic violet, stark gold leaf accents, and matte cream background. Composition should be highly symmetrical with the constellations centered. The style should be highly detailed scientific illustration meets Art Nouveau geometry, rendered with clean vector lines for high print fidelity. Strong contrast between the dark background and luminous gold lines. Flat graphic composition suitable for textile print, isolated on a clean background.
negative: low detail, blurry, text, watermark, logo, artifact, signature, gradient, noise, amateur, busy, messy, disfigured, extra limbs, bad anatomy
